Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" as the username.
2. User enters "testpassword" as the password.
3. User clicks the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System redirects to the dashboard.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has an invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "wronguser" as the username.
2. User enters "wrongpassword" as the password.
3. User clicks the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and sees an error message.

Title: User attempts to add another user
Preconditions: User is logged in and has admin privileges.
Test Data:
- New username: newuser
- New password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add User" button.
2. User enters "newuser" as the username.
3. User enters "newpassword" as the password.
4. User clicks the "Add" button.
5. System verifies the credentials.
6. System adds the new user.
Expected Result: New user is added successfully.

Title: User attempts to add another user with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is logged in but does not have admin privileges.
Test Data:
- New username: newuser
- New password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add User" button.
2. User enters "newuser" as the username.
3. User enters "newpassword" as the password.
4. User clicks the "Add" button.
5. System checks user permissions.
6. System denies the request.
Expected Result: User is not allowed to add a new user and sees an error message.

Title: User attempts to delete another user
Preconditions: User is logged in and has admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Delete User" button.
2. User enters "12345" as the user ID.
3. User clicks the "Delete" button.
4. System verifies the user ID.
5. System deletes the user.
Expected Result: User is deleted successfully.

Title: User attempts to delete another user with invalid ID
Preconditions: User is logged in and has admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Delete User" button.
2. User enters "98765" as the user ID.
3. User clicks the "Delete" button.
4. System verifies the user ID.
5. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not deleted and sees an error message.

Title: User logs in through Firebase Authentication
Preconditions: User has a valid email and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser@example.com" as the email.
2. User enters "testpassword" as the password.
3. User clicks the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System redirects to the dashboard.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User logs in with invalid Firebase credentials
Preconditions: User has an invalid email or password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "wronguser@example.com" as the email.
2. User enters "wrongpassword" as the password.
3. User clicks the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and sees an error message.

Title: Main class interacts with Firebase and RealTime Database
Preconditions: Main class is initialized and connected to Firebase and RealTime Database.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initializes.
2. Main class connects to Firebase.
3. Main class connects to RealTime Database.
4. Main class performs a database operation.
Expected Result: Database operation is successful.

Title: Main class fails to connect to Firebase
Preconditions: Main class is initialized but unable to connect to Firebase.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initializes.
2. Main class attempts to connect to Firebase.
3. Connection fails.
Expected Result: Connection failure is handled gracefully.

Title: Main class fails to connect to RealTime Database
Preconditions: Main class is initialized but unable to connect to RealTime Database.
Test Steps:
1. Main class initializes.
2. Main class attempts to connect to RealTime Database.
3. Connection fails.
Expected Result: Connection failure is handled gracefully.

Title: Map retrieves a random number and associates it with a request object
Preconditions: Map is initialized and connected to Random class.
Test Steps:
1. Map initializes.
2. Map requests a random number from the Random class.
3. Map associates the random number with a request object.
Expected Result: Random number is retrieved and associated with the request object.

Title: Map fails to retrieve a random number
Preconditions: Map is initialized but unable to retrieve a random number.
Test Steps:
1. Map initializes.
2. Map attempts to request a random number from the Random class.
3. Retrieval fails.
Expected Result: Retrieval failure is handled gracefully.

Title: Request retrieves a random number from the Random class
Preconditions: Request is initialized and connected to Random class.
Test Steps:
1. Request initializes.
2. Request requests a random number from the Random class.
Expected Result: Random number is retrieved successfully.

Title: Request fails to retrieve a random number
Preconditions: Request is initialized but unable to retrieve a random number.
Test Steps:
1. Request initializes.
2. Request attempts to request a random number from the Random class.
3. Retrieval fails.
Expected Result: Retrieval failure is handled gracefully.

Title: Response associates a random number with itself
Preconditions: Response is initialized and connected to Random class.
Test Steps:
1. Response initializes.
2. Response associates a random number with itself.
Expected Result: Random number is associated with the response object.

Title: Response fails to associate a random number
Preconditions: Response is initialized but unable to associate a random number.
Test Steps:
1. Response initializes.
2. Response attempts to associate a random number with itself.
3. Association fails.
Expected Result: Association failure is handled gracefully.

Title: Admin adds a new user
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and has admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks the "Add User" button.
2. Admin enters the new user's details.
3. Admin clicks the "Add" button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System adds the new user.
Expected Result: New user is added successfully.

Title: Admin attempts to add a new user without admin privileges
Preconditions: Admin is logged in but does not have admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks the "Add User" button.
2. Admin enters the new user's details.
3. Admin clicks the "Add" button.
4. System checks user permissions.
5. System denies the request.
Expected Result: User is not added and sees an error message.

Title: Admin deletes a user
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and has admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks the "Delete User" button.
2. Admin enters the user ID.
3. Admin clicks the "Delete" button.
4. System verifies the user ID.
5. System deletes the user.
Expected Result: User is deleted successfully.

Title: Admin attempts to delete a user without admin privileges
Preconditions: Admin is logged in but does not have admin privileges.
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks the "Delete User" button.
2. Admin enters the user ID.
3. Admin clicks the "Delete" button.
4. System checks user permissions.
5. System denies the request.
Expected Result: User is not deleted and sees an error message.

Title: User logs in and Firebase Authentication processes the login
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User sends login credentials to MAIN.
2. User sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
3. MAIN processes the login.
4. Firebase Authentication processes the login.
5. System verifies the credentials.
6. System redirects to the dashboard.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has an invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User sends login credentials to MAIN.
2. User sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
3. MAIN processes the login.
4. Firebase Authentication processes the login.
5. System verifies the credentials.
6. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and sees an error message.

Title: User logs in and Firebase Authentication processes the login with Firebase
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User sends login credentials to MAIN.
2. User sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
3. MAIN processes the login.
4. Firebase Authentication processes the login.
5. Firebase creates a user with the provided email.
6. System verifies the credentials.
7. System redirects to the dashboard.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials and Firebase Authentication processes the login
Preconditions: User has an invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. User sends login credentials to MAIN.
2. User sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
3. MAIN processes the login.
4. Firebase Authentication processes the login.
5. Firebase creates a user with the provided email.
6. System verifies the credentials.
7. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is not logged in and sees an error message.

Title: User logs in and Firebase Authentication processes the login with Firebase and RealTime Database
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User sends login credentials to MAIN.
2. User sends login credentials to Firebase Authentication.
